channel.title: Learning Hugo - Step 001
channel.description: Recent content on Learning Hugo - Step 001

item.title: Showing Post Dates
item.description: Enabling post metadata in the Roadster theme.

item.title: Deploy a Private Hugo Website to GitHub Pages with GitHub Actions and Deploy Keys
item.description: Keep your Hugo source repository private while automatically deploying the generated website to a public GitHub Pages repository using GitHub Actions and an SSH deploy key.

item.title: Some More Hugo Notes
item.description: Useful Hugo commands, blog posts and an alternative theme.

item.title: My First Post
item.description: A short introduction to Hugo and some useful examples and references.
